opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My bladder feels like it's filled with battery acid and razor blades — I'm in so much pain I can't breathe properly. I'm rushing to the toilet every ten minutes but only a few drops come out and it burns like fire. I've had my chronic bladder pain condition for years but this is the worst flare ever. My husband is really worried.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain suddenly got unbearable over the last 12 hours and nothing I've taken is touching it — I'm desperate and panicking.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 12 hours ago as mild pressure and got dramatically worse
symptom_narrative.character: burning, raw, like acid and razor blades in my bladder; the pain is worst as my bladder fills and when I try to wee
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been, way past a 10 out of 10, I can't cope
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down over my bladder, right at the front, and it's spread across my lower tummy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, but spikes when my bladder fills and when I pass urine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped — I've tried a hot water bottle which takes the edge off a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: my bladder filling up, and passing urine burns terribly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: having to wee constantly but only drops come out, terrible burning, and I'm exhausted from the pain and no sleep
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares of my bladder condition every few months but never anything this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck on the bathroom floor, can't walk properly because everything down there is cramping and spasming, and I haven't slept

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-term bladder pain condition — the specialists called it interstitial cystitis / bladder pain syndrome
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: a few years ago after lots of tests
past_medical_history.how_managed: diet changes, avoiding bladder irritants, and flare medications from my GP

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I took the maximum amount today
I've taken the maximum on the packet today and it did nothing

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the pain and lack of sleep have me feeling completely desperate; my husband is here with me

objective_data_offered.value: 36.8 C, I checked with our thermometer — no fever
my heart is pounding really fast — my watch showed about 110
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single wearable reading taken during a severe pain and panic episode

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing really fast because it hurts so much
spouse reports she is curled up on the bathroom floor, crying, breathing fast, and rushing to pass tiny amounts of urine every few minutes
